ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "burden_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of occupational burden based on various factors */,
  "licensed_states" INTEGER /* Number of states requiring licensing for this occupation */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with obtaining a license */,
  "calendar_days_lost" INTEGER /* Estimated days lost due to occupational burdens */,
  "education_requirement" TEXT /* Minimum education requirement for the occupation */,
  "experience_requirement" TEXT /* Minimum experience requirement for the occupation */,
  "exam_requirements" INTEGER /* Number of exams required for licensure */,
  "min_grade" INTEGER /* Minimum grade required for licensure */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age requirement for licensure */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the occupation is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the occupation's data */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body responsible for the occupation */,
  "annual_licensing_fee" REAL /* Annual fee required to maintain the license */,
  "occupational_hazard_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the level of occupational hazards */,
  "public_health_impact" INTEGER /* Score indicating the impact on public health and safety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "occupations_count" INTEGER /* Number of occupations requiring licensing in this state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state's data */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body responsible for licensing in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this fee is associated with */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the licensing fee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee amount becomes effective */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fee data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this exam is associated with */,
  "exam_count" INTEGER /* Number of exams required for this occupation */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam */,
  "exam_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the exam */,
  "passing_score" INTEGER /* Score required to pass the exam */,
  "exam_fee" REAL /* Fee required to take the exam */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exam data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_requirements" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this education requirement is associated with */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Description of the education level required */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree or certification required */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study required */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the education requirement data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_requirements_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_requirements" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience entry */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation this experience requirement is associated with */,
  "experience_details" TEXT /* Details of the experience required */,
  "experience_type" TEXT /* Type of experience required */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the required experience in years or hours */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experience requirement data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experience_requirements_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)
